svg:
<svg id="018-storage-compare" viewBox="0 0 760 330" role="img" aria-label="存储结构对比" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">存储结构对比</text><rect class="box" x="55" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="55" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="205" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">顺序表</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="145">连续空间</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="179">随机存取</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="213">存储密度高</text><rect class="box" x="405" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="405" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="555" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">链表</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="145">离散结点</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="179">指针连接</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="213">容量灵活</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 356 180 H 402"/></svg>

<svg id="018-create-destroy" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="创建销毁对比" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">创建销毁对比</text><rect class="box pulse" x="30" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="105" y="143" text-anchor="middle">开始</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 188 137 H 297"/><rect class="box" x="305" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="380" y="143" text-anchor="middle">不同结构的内存管理差异</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 463 137 H 572"/><rect class="box" x="580" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="655" y="143" text-anchor="middle">结束</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="205" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="210">动画高亮表示处理步骤正在推进</text></svg>

<svg id="018-operation-compare" viewBox="0 0 760 330" role="img" aria-label="基本操作效率对比" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">基本操作效率对比</text><rect class="box" x="55" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="55" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#2563eb" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="205" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">顺序表</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="145">按位 O(1)</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="179">插删需移动</text><circle class="main pulse" cx="83" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="99" y="213">有序可折半</text><rect class="box" x="405" y="75" width="300" height="210" rx="10"/><rect x="405" y="75" width="300" height="42" rx="10" fill="#f97316" opacity=".14"/><text class="text" x="555" y="102" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">链表</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="140" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="145">查找 O(n)</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="174" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="179">插删改指针</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="433" cy="208" r="5"/><text class="text small" x="449" y="213">额外指针域</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 356 180 H 402"/></svg>

<svg id="018-choice-flow" viewBox="0 0 760 260" role="img" aria-label="结构选择流程" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <style>
      .bg{fill:#f8fafc}.box{fill:#fff;stroke:#cbd5e1;stroke-width:2}.main{fill:#2563eb}.accent{fill:#f97316}.ok{fill:#10b981}
      .text{fill:#1f2937;font-family:'Microsoft YaHei','PingFang SC',sans-serif;font-size:16px}.small{font-size:13px}.tiny{font-size:12px}
      .arrow{stroke:#2563eb;stroke-width:2.4;fill:none;marker-end:url(#arrow)}.dash{stroke-dasharray:7 5;animation:dash 3s linear infinite}
      .pulse{animation:pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite}.move{animation:move 4s ease-in-out infinite}.scan{animation:scan 4s ease-in-out infinite}
      @keyframes dash{to{stroke-dashoffset:-48}}@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes move{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(18px)}}@keyframes scan{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0)}50%{transform:translateX(250px)}}
    </style>
    <defs>
      <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="8" orient="auto-start-reverse">
        <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#2563eb"/>
      </marker>
    </defs><rect class="bg" x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%" rx="12"/><text class="text" x="24" y="38" font-weight="700">结构选择流程</text><rect class="box pulse" x="30" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="105" y="143" text-anchor="middle">表长</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 188 137 H 297"/><rect class="box" x="305" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="380" y="143" text-anchor="middle">插删</text><path class="arrow dash" d="M 463 137 H 572"/><rect class="box" x="580" y="105" width="150" height="64" rx="8"/><text class="text small" x="655" y="143" text-anchor="middle">查询决定选择</text><circle class="accent pulse" cx="48" cy="205" r="8"/><text class="text small" x="66" y="210">动画高亮表示处理步骤正在推进</text></svg>
